component.name: Sin's Guide
component.summary: Path of Exile 2 campaign tracker and overlay for Linux

description.p: A transparent overlay that sits on top of Path of Exile 2 to track your campaign progress in real time. Provides step-by-step zone-level guidance, gem requirement tracking from Path of Building imports, and effective EXP calculations — all without alt-tabbing.

ul.li: Step-by-step campaign guide for all 7 acts (281 steps)
Zone-aware step filtering with auto-advance via Client.txt
Real-time effective EXP using the Mobalytics formula
Gem tracking with OCR (Tesseract) and Path of Building import
Draggable transparent overlay with configurable appearance

screenshot.caption: UI overview showing all overlay states
